description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a light gray woven fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. Five accent pillows in dark gray and taupe tones are arranged along the backrest, adding contrast and comfort. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive silhouette. The sofa is elevated on slim, exposed wooden legs with a warm brown finish, providing a touch of mid-century style. The overall design is clean, contemporary, and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with a left chaise, boxy armrests, and slim wooden legs. It features three seat cushions, three back cushions, and five accent pillows in gray and taupe.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, all seat and back cushions, and the arrangement of five accent pillows.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end, highlighting the depth of the chaise, the straight armrest, and the profile of the cushions and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, the uniform height of the back and armrests, and the exposed wooden legs.
description_view_3: Side view from the sofa end, emphasizing the length of the main seating section, the armrest, and the arrangement of cushions and pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size, with five loose accent pillows arranged along the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, fully padded and upholstered in the same fabric as the sofa.
attribute_leg_design: Six slim, exposed wooden legs with a rectangular profile, positioned at the corners and midpoints for support, featuring a warm brown finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, composed of three loose, uniform back cushions with no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light gray woven fabric with a subtle, uniform texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
